name: wellforge
description: Full-stack development plugin for Spring Boot Kotlin + React TypeScript projects. Bundles a spec-driven workflow (spec/plan/design/tasks/implement commands) with rigor tiers (spike/mvp/production — match ceremony to stakes via /wellforge:spike or --mode, graduate with /wellforge:promote), a role-based agent team (PO, architect, designer, FE/BE dev, devops, QE, LM-judge evaluator) with an orchestrator, eval (rubric-scored LM-judge) and status commands, a Copier-based scaffolder with connection checklists, brownfield adoption, skills, security and ADR specialist agents, lifecycle hooks, and MCP servers (sequential-thinking, playwright, github, context-hub).
